nasb.text: For I am the Lord who brought you up from the land of Egypt to be your God; thus you shall be holy, for I am holy.’ ”

esv.text: For I am the Lord who brought you up out of the land of Egypt to be your God. You shall therefore be holy, for I am holy.”

cnv.text: 因為我是耶和華，曾把你們從埃及地領上來，為要作你們的　神；你們要分別為聖，因為我是聖潔的。”

ccb.text: 我是耶和华，我带你们离开埃及，为要做你们的上帝。你们要圣洁，因为我是圣洁的。
